result.markdown:
--- title: "Global BF-NEE trends" --- ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} library(dplyr) library(readr) library(tidyr) library(ggplot2) library(scales) dir_diag <- "~/Symobio/Data/Processed/BF_NEE_Diagnostics" diag <- read_csv( file.path( dir_diag, "bfnee_country_diagnostics_all_transitions.csv" ), show_col_types = FALSE ) valid <- read_csv( file.path( dir_diag, "bfnee_valid_countries.csv" ), show_col_types = FALSE ) valid_iso3 <- valid %>% filter(valid_for_analysis) %>% pull(iso3) ``` ::: # Overview This page summarizes global BF-NEE trends based on countries that passed all processing and scale diagnostics. ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} global_trend <- diag %>% filter( iso3 %in% valid_iso3, status == "ok", suspicious_old_scale == FALSE ) %>% group_by(year, transition) %>% summarise( global_bfnee_km2 = sum(bfnee_sum_km2, na.rm = TRUE), global_natural_loss_km2 = sum(natural_loss_sum_km2, na.rm = TRUE), n_countries = n_distinct(iso3), .groups = "drop" ) %>% arrange(year) %>% mutate( bfnee_index = global_bfnee_km2 / first(global_bfnee_km2) * 100, natural_loss_index = global_natural_loss_km2 / first(global_natural_loss_km2) * 100, bfnee_share_of_loss = global_bfnee_km2 / global_natural_loss_km2 ) ``` ::: # Global BF-NEE ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} ggplot( global_trend, aes( x = year, y = global_bfnee_km2 ) ) + geom_line() + geom_point() + scale_y_continuous( labels = comma ) + labs( title = "Global BF-NEE", subtitle = "Validated countries only", x = "Year", y = "BF-NEE (km²)" ) + theme_minimal() ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](02_global_trends_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-3-1.svg){width=672} ::: ::: # Global natural ecosystem loss ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} ggplot( global_trend, aes( x = year, y = global_natural_loss_km2 ) ) + geom_line() + geom_point() + scale_y_continuous( labels = comma ) + labs( title = "Global natural ecosystem loss", subtitle = "Validated countries only", x = "Year", y = "Natural ecosystem loss (km²)" ) + theme_minimal() ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](02_global_trends_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-4-1.svg){width=672} ::: ::: # Absolute comparison ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} global_trend_long <- global_trend %>% select( year, global_bfnee_km2, global_natural_loss_km2 ) %>% pivot_longer( cols = c( global_bfnee_km2, global_natural_loss_km2 ), names_to = "indicator", values_to = "value_km2" ) %>% mutate( indicator = recode( indicator, global_bfnee_km2 = "BF-NEE", global_natural_loss_km2 = "Natural ecosystem loss" ) ) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} ggplot( global_trend_long, aes( x = year, y = value_km2, linetype = indicator ) ) + geom_line() + geom_point() + scale_y_continuous( labels = comma ) + labs( title = "Absolute comparison", subtitle = "Validated countries only", x = "Year", y = "Area (km²)", linetype = "Indicator" ) + theme_minimal() ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](02_global_trends_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-6-1.svg){width=672} ::: ::: # Relative change (first period = 100) This figure compares rates of change only. Both indicators are normalized so that the first period equals 100. ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} global_trend_index_long <- global_trend %>% select( year, bfnee_index, natural_loss_index ) %>% pivot_longer( cols = c( bfnee_index, natural_loss_index ), names_to = "indicator", values_to = "index" ) %>% mutate( indicator = recode( indicator, bfnee_index = "BF-NEE", natural_loss_index = "Natural ecosystem loss" ) ) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} ggplot( global_trend_index_long, aes( x = year, y = index, linetype = indicator ) ) + geom_line() + geom_point() + labs( title = "Relative change in BF-NEE and natural ecosystem loss", subtitle = "First period = 100", x = "Year", y = "Index", linetype = "Indicator" ) + theme_minimal() ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](02_global_trends_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-8-1.svg){width=672} ::: ::: # BF-NEE share of natural ecosystem loss This figure shows the proportion of natural ecosystem loss represented by BF-NEE. ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} ggplot( global_trend, aes( x = year, y = bfnee_share_of_loss ) ) + geom_line() + geom_point() + scale_y_continuous( labels = percent_format( accuracy = 1 ) ) + labs( title = "BF-NEE as share of natural ecosystem loss", subtitle = "Validated countries only", x = "Year", y = "BF-NEE / natural ecosystem loss" ) + theme_minimal() ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](02_global_trends_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-9-1.svg){width=672} ::: ::: # Diagnostic table ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} global_trend ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
````` ::: :::
